perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair is seen indoors, holding a green plastic bag of coriander-flavored macarons. She has a skeptical facial expression. (2) She transitions to opening a transparent plastic box containing white mochi (Lover's Fruit Daifuku). She picks one up, bites into it, and shows the green filling to the camera. (3) The scene shifts to her holding another transparent box with yellow, rectangular jelly cakes. She stretches one with her fingers to show the elasticity and then eats it. (4) Finally, she opens the coriander macaron package, looks apprehensive, then bites into one. She reacts with surprise, followed by satisfaction, and then drinks from a large clear cup of iced coffee.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and rhythmic background music with a light electronic beat plays continuously. A female voice speaks in an excited and curious tone in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects (SFX) such as a 'boing' or high-pitched chime accompany transitions. (3) Audible chewing and swallowing sounds occur during the tasting segments. (4) The music remains at a consistent volume while the speaker's tone shifts from doubt to high-pitched enthusiasm as she finishes the tasting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '台灣才有的特殊甜點' (Unique desserts only in Taiwan) appears at the top. (2) Decorative Text: '香菜馬卡龍?' (Coriander Macaron?) with a question mark. (3) Functional Text: '1. 情人果大福' (1. Lover's Fruit Daifuku) and '2. 百香果涼糕' (2. Passion Fruit Jelly Cake). (4) Hook Text: '沒有香菜的味道！就好吃啊！！！' (No coriander taste! It's just delicious!!!) emphasizing her reaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Sequential Tasting of 3 Items -> Final Verdict and Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a black strapless top, with detailed eye makeup and light blue nail polish.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of a white gaming-style chair and a plain, neutrally lit wall, suggesting a home studio setup.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Review Item 1 -> Review Item 2 -> Review Item 3 -> Closing
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote unique Taiwanese desserts from the 'We Sweet' brand, specifically focusing on the novelty of coriander-flavored macarons to engage viewers with a 'fear vs. reality' reaction narrative.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Displaying branded packaging (We Sweet) and providing a detailed taste test with positive feedback.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of high-contrast text overlays and 'food porn' style close-ups of texture.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the controversial nature of coriander as a flavor to drive engagement, while maintaining a friendly, influencer-style persona.
